# Contributing to CrowdFund DApp

## Setup
Run these commands to get started:
- git clone https://github.com/BhariGowda/crowdfund-dapp
- forge install
- forge build
- forge test

## Guidelines
- All PRs must pass forge test (146 tests)
- Run slither before submitting
- Add NatSpec to new functions
- Follow CEI pattern for state changes
